{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Foreign Intent
| introduced = Of Killers and Kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Foreign Intent]] is a power or [[Awakened object]] used to seal buildings.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
